text:
There once was a bear named Benny who lived deep in the forest. Benny enjoyed eating nuts, berries, and lounging about doing nothing important.

One day, Benny woke up feeling unusually ambitious. He decided he would climb Mount Everest. Benny spent months training for this monumental task. He grew his own bear plumage for insulation, practiced acrobatics, learned to climb, ate nothing but birdseed to stay strong, and even adopted a tiny bird companion to keep him company.

When the big day finally arrived, Benny was ready. He scaled his way up to the summit, enjoying the panoramic view of the world. However, as he stood looking out over the icy wastes staring into the vast nothingness, Benny realized he had made a colossal mistake. All those birdseed had slowed his legs unduly!

Benny descended slowly, lamenting his folly. Eventually he reached the bottom, shaking his small feathered companion free. He was alive and only slightly embarrassed.

And so ends the story of
